title: Add memory trust policy contracts
objective: Define and validate trusted source policy, default trust by source kind, claim policy and retrieval budget contracts.
requirements: Add trust_status, authority_class, trusted_for_context and review ownership fields.
Default external/email/API sources to candidate_only unless explicitly trusted.
Validate allowed trust statuses, authority classes and budget values.
Keep existing memory source contracts backward-compatible through safe defaults.
acceptance_checks: Missing trust fields resolve to conservative candidate_only for external sources.
